anticall.metaDescription: AntiCallCL — a local call screener for Android (Flutter + Kotlin). Filter by prefix, no cloud, no accounts. Open beta.

hero.title: AntiCallCL
hero.intro: A call screener for Android. Runs entirely on your phone — no servers, no accounts. You decide what to do with every call.

paragraphs.origin: AntiCallCL was born in response to the growing problem of unwanted calls: companies and services that call repeatedly — sometimes several times in just a few hours — combined with new forms of phone scams and spam that affect thousands of people in Chile every day.
paragraphs.filter: The app lets you filter and manage calls by prefix, identifying number ranges used for marketing campaigns or suspicious attempts. This gives the user control over their time and their privacy, reducing interruptions and risks.
paragraphs.choice: AntiCallCL doesn't block calls automatically and doesn't access personal info: it offers clear, useful tools so each person can decide how to handle incoming calls.

filter.title: Filter by prefix
filter.body: Identifiable number ranges for marketing, telemarketing, or scam attempts.

choice.title: You decide
choice.body: It doesn't block automatically. It gives you the information and you make the call.

curated.title: Curated CL list
curated.body: Verifiable, editable, and exportable Chilean prefix list inside the app.

local.title: 100% local
local.body: No accounts, no servers, no cloud. Everything is processed and stored on your phone.

gallery.title: Screenshots.
gallery.subtitle: Click any image to open the viewer.

stack.title: How it's built.
stack.subtitle: The app runs 100% on the phone. No backend, no servers, no accounts.

details.ui: Cross-platform interface, theming, navigation, forms, and state.
details.native: CallScreeningService, contacts, sensitive permissions, and local persistence.

points.local: Your lists and metrics live only on your device
points.noAccount: The app runs with no registration, no accounts, no cloud
points.wipe: You can wipe everything from settings at any time
points.uninstall: Uninstalling the app automatically removes all data

datos.title: Data we collect
datos.body: AntiCall Chile does not collect, store, or transmit personal data to external servers. All blocking and analysis logic runs locally on your device.

uso.title: How we use information
uso.body: Since there's no cloud transfer, information use is strictly limited to the app's local operation.

compartir.title: When we share data
compartir.body: There is no automatic data transfer or sharing, because the information never leaves your device.

derechos.title: User rights
derechos.body: Even though the app doesn't store data on servers, we respect the rights granted by Chilean and international law.

seguridad.title: Security measures
seguridad.body: We designed the solution to minimize attack surface and external dependencies.

conservacion.title: Retention period
conservacion.body: Since the information stays only on your phone, you decide how long to keep it.

contacto.title: Privacy contact
contacto.body: Questions or requests? Our team is available to help.

bullets.no-accounts: We do not request accounts or credentials: the app runs without registration.
bullets.local-lists: Blocked numbers and custom lists live only on your phone.
bullets.local-metrics: Call metrics are stored locally and you can delete them whenever you want.
bullets.system-permissions: We only access system permissions to run essential features and never copy that information off the device.
bullets.process: Process call events on the device to detect and block spam.
bullets.config: Remember your settings, lists, and preferences only inside the app's storage.
bullets.metrics: Show basic metrics so you can gauge blocking effectiveness.
bullets.export: Let you manually export or delete any locally-stored data.
bullets.no-third-parties: We do not work with third parties that process your personal data.
bullets.voluntary: You can only share information if you decide to export or send it voluntarily.
bullets.legal: In case of legal obligation, we would first request the relevant information from you, since we don't store it by default.
bullets.control: Full control from the app to review or delete local records.
bullets.backup: Option to back up your lists and metrics on your own device before uninstalling.
bullets.support: Support for privacy or compliance-related inquiries.
bullets.channel: Open channel to report any incident or concern.
bullets.local-only: Local processing: no sync with servers, no cloud copies.
bullets.official-api: Use of official platform APIs to manage sensitive permissions.
bullets.updates: Periodic updates to keep the software free of known vulnerabilities.
bullets.device-recommendations: In-app recommendations to help you protect your device (PIN, biometrics, encryption).
bullets.settings: You can wipe history, lists, and settings from the app at any time.
bullets.uninstall: Uninstalling the app automatically removes all associated data.
